evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long owns the current global worst MAE at -513.4 while still contributing $1261.5 over 34 trades. Static broad filters overlap protected extended-VWAP winners, so this is better expressed as a path-aware classifier if more static boundary nudges fail.
name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
risk: Can overfit a small number of delayed recoveries or block clean high-extension winners unless protected fast-winner retention is explicitly validated.
trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to make early positive progress after entry.
validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98% of leader, and slow_12h_trades at 0.
